title: LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NW MCMINNVILLE - 211info
text: LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST YAMHILL COUNTY LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NW MCMINNVILLE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual, family, and couples counseling. Offers programs to address behavioral challenges in children and adolescents. Additional services include psychiatric assessments, battered intervention programs, and anger management counseling. Parent education classes are offered throughout the year. 435 NE Evans Street Suite A McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, additional hours by appointment Email (503) 472-4020 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 472-4020 Main phone Main phone (503) 472-4020 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP and sliding scale fees are available DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-4pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Anger Management Child Guidance Conjoint Counseling Domestic Violence Intervention Programs Family Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLABORATIVE HOME SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING EDUCATION GROUPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN LEGAL SERVICES - SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
